title: Agent-readiness improvements for edmundmiller.dev
description:
Cloudflare's Agent Readiness scan for https://edmundmiller.dev reports Level 1/5. Passing: robots.txt and sitemap. Track remediation work for failing checks from https://isitagentready.com/edmundmiller.dev and https://blog.cloudflare.com/agent-readiness/.

Priority plan:
- P2: Do first / high-value content-discovery wins: Link response headers, Markdown for Agents content negotiation, and robots.txt Content-Signal directives.
- P3: Nice-to-have agent consumability: llms.txt / llms-full.txt and Agent Skills discovery if useful for the personal site.
- P4: Evaluate or document as not applicable unless the site gains an API, auth surface, agent endpoint, or browser tools: API Catalog, OAuth discovery, OAuth Protected Resource metadata, MCP Server Card, A2A Agent Card, and WebMCP.

Use the child issue priorities as the source of truth for execution order.
close_reason: Agent-readiness work complete: implemented the high-value static-site improvements, canceled non-applicable API/auth/agent-tool checks, and deferred Agent Skills until there are real site actions to expose.

title: Add Link response headers for agent discovery
description: Failing check: linkHeaders. Add RFC 8288 Link headers on the homepage/site responses pointing agents to useful resources such as sitemap, llms.txt/markdown, feed, and any well-known discovery docs that exist. If deployed on Cloudflare Pages/Workers, implement via _headers or Worker middleware; if Netlify, via netlify.toml/_headers. Validate with curl -I https://edmundmiller.dev and re-run isitagentready.
close_reason: Implemented agent-readiness basics: robots Content-Signal, generated llms.txt/llms-full.txt plus page markdown, Worker Link headers, and Accept: text/markdown negotiation.

title: Publish an Agent Skills discovery index if useful
description: Failing check: agentSkills. For a personal site, consider publishing /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json if there are useful agent actions/skills (e.g. read blog, search site, contact, inspect projects). Include schema, skills array, URLs, and sha256 digests per Cloudflare Agent Skills Discovery RFC.
close_reason: Not useful for the current static personal site until there are actual site actions, tools, or agent-callable skills to expose; llms.txt, Markdown negotiation, sitemap, RSS, and Link headers already cover the useful agent-readability layer.

title: Evaluate WebMCP browser tool exposure
description: Failing check: webMcp. Likely not essential for a static personal site. Decide whether any in-browser tools should be exposed through navigator.modelContext.registerTool(), such as site search or navigation helpers. Implement only if useful and supported safely.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Support Markdown for Agents content negotiation
description: Failing check: markdownNegotiation. Requests with Accept: text/markdown should receive a clean Markdown representation while browsers continue to receive HTML. For Astro, investigate build-time .md route generation and/or server/edge middleware that maps page URLs to Markdown equivalents. Use Cloudflare docs style guide as reference: /index.md and Accept: text/markdown. Validate with curl -H 'Accept: text/markdown' https://edmundmiller.dev/.
close_reason: Implemented agent-readiness basics: robots Content-Signal, generated llms.txt/llms-full.txt plus page markdown, Worker Link headers, and Accept: text/markdown negotiation.

title: Add Content-Signal directives to robots.txt
description: Failing check: contentSignals. Add Content-Signal directives to robots.txt declaring ai-train, search, and ai-input preferences. Choose policy intentionally for the personal site (e.g. allow search/input, decide whether training is allowed). Validate robots.txt and re-run Agent Readiness scan.
close_reason: Implemented agent-readiness basics: robots Content-Signal, generated llms.txt/llms-full.txt plus page markdown, Worker Link headers, and Accept: text/markdown negotiation.

title: Evaluate and publish llms.txt / llms-full.txt for the site
description: The default scan did not require llms.txt, but Cloudflare recommends llms.txt and llms-full.txt for agent consumability. Generate a concise root /llms.txt with site summary and important links, and optionally /llms-full.txt for bulk/offline indexing of posts/pages. Consider automation in Astro build.
close_reason: Implemented agent-readiness basics: robots Content-Signal, generated llms.txt/llms-full.txt plus page markdown, Worker Link headers, and Accept: text/markdown negotiation.

title: Evaluate API Catalog applicability
description: Failing check: apiCatalog. The personal site likely has no public API; decide whether to mark not applicable or publish /.well-known/api-catalog only if there are meaningful API-like resources. If implemented, serve application/linkset+json per RFC 9727 with service-desc/service-doc/status links.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Evaluate OAuth discovery applicability
description: Failing check: oauthDiscovery. Likely not applicable unless the site exposes protected APIs. Confirm there is no OAuth/OIDC authorization server for edmundmiller.dev. If one is added later, publish /.well-known/openid-configuration or /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Evaluate OAuth Protected Resource metadata applicability
description: Failing check: oauthProtectedResource. Likely not applicable unless the site exposes protected resources/APIs. If applicable later, publish /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource with resource, authorization_servers, and scopes_supported per RFC 9728.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Evaluate MCP Server Card applicability
description: Failing check: mcpServerCard. Decide whether edmundmiller.dev should advertise an MCP server. If there is no MCP endpoint, leave as not applicable; if one exists, serve /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json with serverInfo, transport endpoint, and capabilities.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Evaluate A2A Agent Card applicability
description: Failing check: a2aAgentCard. Decide whether the site represents an agent that should be discoverable via A2A. If not, document as not applicable. If yes, serve /.well-known/agent-card.json with name/version/description/interfaces/capabilities/skills.
close_reason: Canceled as not applicable for the current static personal site: no public API, OAuth/auth surface, MCP endpoint, A2A agent, or browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

title: Dependency Dashboard
description:
This issue lists Renovate updates and detected dependencies. Read the [Dependency Dashboard](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/) docs to learn more.
[View this repository on the Mend.io Web Portal](https://developer.mend.io/github/edmundmiller/edmundmiller.dev). ## Deprecations / Replacements > [!WARNING] The following dependencies are either deprecated or have replacements available. | Datasource | Package | Replacement PR? | |------------|------|--------------| | npm | [remark-unwrap-images](https://redirect.github.com/remarkjs/remark-unwrap-images) | ![Unavailable](https://img.shields.io/badge/unavailable-orange?style=flat-square) | ## Awaiting Schedule The following updates are awaiting their schedule. To get an update now, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] chore(deps): pin dependencies (`@types/react`, `@types/react-dom`) - [ ] fix(deps): pin dependencies (`@astrojs/react`, `@types/d3-scale`, `@types/d3-shape`, `actions/checkout`, `actions/setup-node`, `clsx`, `d3-scale`, `d3-shape`, `motion`, `oxfmt`, `oxlint`, `react`, `react-dom`, `tailwind-merge`) - [ ] chore(deps): update dependency postcss to v8.5.17 - [ ] fix(deps): update astro monorepo (`@astrojs/markdown-remark`, `@astrojs/mdx`, `astro`) - [ ] fix(deps): update dependency @types/hast to v3.0.5 - [ ] chore(deps): update actions/stale action to v10.4.0 - [ ] chore(deps): update dependency oxfmt to ^0.58.0 - [ ] chore(deps): update node.js to v22.23.1 - [ ] chore(deps): update pnpm to v11.12.0 - [ ] fix(deps): update dependency sharp to v0.35.3 - [ ] chore(deps): update actions/checkout action to v7 - [ ] chore(deps): update actions/setup-node action to v6 - [ ] chore(deps): update dependency node to v24.18.0 - [ ] chore(deps): update dependency tailwindcss to v4 - [ ] chore(deps): update dependency typescript to v7 - [ ] chore(deps): update determinatesystems/flake-checker-action action to v12 - [ ] chore(deps): update determinatesystems/magic-nix-cache-action action to v14 - [ ] chore(deps): update determinatesystems/nix-installer-action action to v22 - [ ] chore(deps): update stefanzweifel/git-auto-commit-action action to v7 - [ ] 🔐 **Create all awaiting schedule PRs at once** 🔐 ## Open The following updates have all been created. To force a retry/rebase of any, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] [chore(deps): update dependency remark-unwrap-images to v5](../pull/108) ## Detected Dependencies
dockerfile (1)
Dockerfile (2) - `docker/dockerfile 1` - `node 22.2.0-slim` → [Updates: `22.23.1-slim`, `24.18.0-slim`]

.github/workflows/ci.yml (3) - `actions/checkout v4` → [Updates: `v4.3.1`, `v7`] - `actions/setup-node v4` → [Updates: `v4.4.0`, `v6`] - `node 24.17.0` → [Updates: `24.18.0`]
.github/workflows/openring.yml (5) - `actions/checkout v6.0.3` → [Updates: `v7.0.0`] - `DeterminateSystems/flake-checker-action v9` → [Updates: `v12`] - `DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action v16` → [Updates: `v22`] - `DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action v8` → [Updates: `v14`] - `stefanzweifel/git-auto-commit-action v5.2.0` → [Updates: `v7.2.0`]

title: Write Simply: Published posts
description: Revise every published post against Paul Graham's Write Simply: ordinary words, simple sentences, low reading friction, deliberate complexity, and aggressive cutting. Published work takes priority over drafts.

title: Write simply: altair-upset
description: Path: src/content/post/altair-upset.md. Fixes: Keep one deliberate metaphor; cut repeated game, boss-fight, murder-mystery, and cheat-code imagery; simplify the opening; end after the crisp result and source link. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Personal Site Analytics
description: Path: src/content/post/personal-analytics.md. Fixes: Replace the florid opening with the actual motivation; remove duplicated Fathom, Plausible, and Umami comparisons; state the decision criterion and final choice. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: A New Vue on Life
description: Path: src/content/post/personal-rewrite.md. Fixes: Cut abandoned-tool chronology; organize around shipping versus stronger guarantees; remove jargon and stacked metaphors; keep one plain concluding comparison. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Pixi for Bioinformatics
description: Path: src/content/post/pixi-bioinformatics.md. Fixes: Replace corporate wording and buzzwords; repair the broken package-manager history; cut sales transitions and filler; state Pixi's benefit directly. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Seqera Containers Part 1
description: Path: src/content/post/seqera-containers-part-1.mdx. Fixes: Shorten the ceremonial opening; halve the governance timeline; turn passive architecture prose into concrete actions and guarantees; remove repeated reproducibility claims. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Seqera Containers Part 2
description: Path: src/content/post/seqera-containers-part-2.mdx. Fixes: Condense audience framing; remove repeated previews and summaries; replace decorative automation language and corporate abstractions with direct descriptions. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Site v3
description: Path: src/content/post/site-v3.md. Fixes: Split the opening sentence; state the static-site lesson once; simplify the publishing requirement; cut the unrelated editor-tooling footnote. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Thoughts on NixOS
description: Path: src/content/post/thoughts-nixos.md. Fixes: Break tangled sentences and the long Node example into steps; define or cut ricing jargon; separate factual Guix differences from opinion; remove loaded phrasing. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Writing Streak
description: Path: src/content/post/writing-streak.md. Fixes: Simplify the opening joke; paraphrase the long quotation; split the Lego-calendar sentence; repair spacing before parentheticals. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Doom Emacs for Astro
description: Path: src/content/post/emacs-astro.md. Fixes: Replace promotional language with exact editor requirements; remove stacked framework and rabbit-hole jokes; shorten the biographical aside. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Emacs Email Config
description: Path: src/content/post/emacs-email.md. Fixes: Compress the multi-account setup history; explain gmailieer directly; show the final script once; explain only the tagging step. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Nextflow Emacs Workflow
description: Path: src/content/post/emacs-nextflow.md. Fixes: Replace formal wording such as utilize and upon saving; split the long comparison; state the editor-independent benefit concretely. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: snakefmt in Emacs
description: Path: src/content/post/emacs-snakefmt.md. Fixes: Simplify the Nix chronology; remove decorative wording; explain Apheleia once; replace the long quotation with a short summary. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: CTRL to Caps Lock
description: Path: src/content/post/first-post.md. Fixes: Repair broken spacing and fragments; split the keyboard-history sentence; present remapping as a direct step followed by its result. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Julia for Bioinformatics
description: Path: src/content/post/julia-bioinformatics.md. Fixes: Rewrite the opening around the central claim; split oversized arguments; replace imagined dialogue and mixed metaphors with concrete examples; cut repeated cost claims. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: Learn Just Enough React
description: Path: src/content/post/learn-react.md. Fixes: Lead with the deployment checklist; shorten the introduction; remove editor-preference detours and unnecessary extensions; replace defensive asides with a plain scope note. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.

title: Write simply: age with org-journal
description: Path: src/content/post/org-journal-age.md. Fixes: Preserve the direct opening; state why rejected approaches failed; reduce the borrowed age summary to two relevant properties; repair fragments in the final setup. Verification: read the rendered post for clarity, then run npm run build.
